ksa_text: Ability to assess and comprehensively inventory organizational data assets, data flows, and technology resources to inform governance decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-003 (Data Governance) scores 0.540 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Knowledge Graph Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.540 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance KSA DG-A-003 as a discrete competency for Knowledge Graph Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Knowledge Graph Engineer market data. Governance content is policy/compliance, not knowledge graph engineering. Score 0.540 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Governance content is policy/compliance, not knowledge graph engineering. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Governance content is policy/compliance, not knowledge graph engineering.
